channel.title: Instant Messaging on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Instant Messaging on Tech Tracker

item.title: Delta - Use your regular email for Instant messaging like signal!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-D7I2KUOgG9I/YSfaHTYorPI/AAAAAAAAGe0/TrgzSvmbT2ocb4oxn3s57LTfOBzoW4O_ACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1630001690196986-0.png" alt=""> E-mail - Electronic mail is the first digital communication technology invented to send and receive information between two or more people with a unique digital email address for sender and reciever generated and provided by thier email service providers they must need computer and a internet connection to check & see emails. It is known fact Email is widely used by people around the world as it is easy & very convenient way to send and receive information but as technology is in rapid advancements in 20th century we got to see many new technologies that can make communication more easy and simple.
